Issues: The image is highly stylized and relies on a very specific aesthetic (synthwave/cyberpunk). While visually appealing, its commercial viability depends heavily on the platform and niche the seller targets.
The lighting and color palette, while striking, might be too niche if sold to a very general audience. It appeals strongly to specific digital art, gaming, or retro-futurism markets.
The overall composition is effective, but for maximum commercial appeal, adding subtle texture or more depth variation could enhance the perceived print quality and realism (if desired).
